name: QA 1309
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1309

Test Linux ZFS PMDA against a live ZFS pool - part B (newer stats files)

See also qa/1532 for part A



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce

See also qa/1532 for part A

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce
